nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Lycium Chinense Fruit/Ophiopogon Japonicus Root/Poria Cocos Sclerotium/Akebia Quinata Stem/Angelica Acutiloba Root/Cnidium Officinale Rhizome/(Artemisia Capillaris/Carthamus Tinctorius) Flower Extract
chemicalDescription: Lycium Chinense Fruit/Ophiopogon Japonicus Root/Poria Cocos Sclerotium/Akebia Quinata Stem/Angelica Acutiloba Root/Cnidium Officinale Rhizome/(Artemisia Capillaris/Carthamus Tinctorius) Flower Extract is the extract of the fruits of Lycium chinense, the roots of Ophiopogon japonicus, the sclerotium of the fungus, Poria cocos, the stems of Akebia quinata, the roots of the Japanese angelica, Angelica acutiloba, the rhizomes of Cnidium officinale, and the flowers of Artemisia capillaris and the safflower, Carthamus tinctorius. The accepted scientific name for Poria cocos is Wolfiporia cocos.
inciName: LYCIUM CHINENSE FRUIT/OPHIOPOGON JAPONICUS ROOT/PORIA COCOS SCLEROTIUM/AKEBIA QUINATA STEM/ANGELICA ACUTILOBA ROOT/CNIDIUM OFFICINALE RHIZOME/(ARTEMISIA CAPILLARIS/CARTHAMUS TINCTORIUS) FLOWER EXTRACT
